content: go-git v5 shallow clone (Depth) is supported but has documented limitations: server-side object enumeration far exceeds native git --depth=1 (issue #545), pull/fetch on a shallow-cloned repo can fail with 'object not found' (issues #305, src-d#900), and tags download by default unless Tags: NoTags. Safe pattern: fresh shallow clone per new SHA (never pull a shallow repo), SingleBranch+NoTags+NoCheckout, in-memory or ephemeral storage; fall back to exec git CLI if server-side enumeration proves slow on large repos.
